jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ajio - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
